| `slt` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd = (rs1 < rs2) \,?\, 1 : 0 \quad (\mathbb{Z})$ | set les than | R |
| `sltu` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd = (rs1 < rs2) \,?\, 1 : 0 \quad (\mathbb{N})$ | set les than unsigned | R |
| `slti` | `rd, rs1, imm12` | $rd = (rs1 < SignExt(imm12)) \,?\, 1 : 0 \quad (\mathbb{Z})$ | set les than immediate | I |
| `sltiu` | `rd, rs1, imm12` | $rd = (rs1 < SignExt(imm12)) \,?\, 1 : 0 \quad (\mathbb{N})$ | set les than immediate unsigned | I |
